query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "leveraging verifier-based reinforcement learning in image editing" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational methodology reference for reinforcement learning exploration mechanisms (specifically value bonuses and ensemble-based optimism) that are central to the "Verifier-Based Reinforcement Learning" approach mentioned in the user's question. It also meets criterion (a) by providing evidence on the same algorithmic mechanism (exploration via value bonuses) used in the user's target domain of RL-based image editing.
